sentences.target: Je poursuis mes études à Lyon.

translations.fr: Je poursuis mes études à Lyon.
translations.en: I am continuing my studies in Lyon.
translations.de: Ich setze mein Studium in Lyon fort.
translations.it: Proseguo i miei studi a Lione.
translations.vi: Tôi tiếp tục việc học ở Lyon.
translations.hi: मैं लियोन में अपनी पढ़ाई जारी रख रहा हूँ.
translations.el: Συνεχίζω τις σπουδές μου στη Λυών.
translations.nb: Jeg fortsetter studiene mine i Lyon.
translations.id: Saya melanjutkan studi saya di Lyon.
translations.sv: Jag fortsätter mina studier i Lyon.
translations.da: Jeg fortsætter mine studier i Lyon.
translations.ja: リヨンで学業を続けています。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 1st person singular; grammatical subject of the verb.
Main verb, present indicative, 1st person singular; transitive, taking 'mes études' as direct object and the PP 'à Lyon' as locative complement.
Possessive determiner, plural; modifies 'études' and agrees in number with it.
Common noun, feminine plural; direct object of 'poursuis'.
Preposition introducing the locative phrase 'à Lyon'.
Proper noun (city name); object of the preposition 'à'.

sentences.target: On peut poursuivre la discussion après.

translations.fr: On peut poursuivre la discussion après.
translations.en: We can continue the discussion later.
translations.es: Podemos continuar la conversación más tarde.
translations.de: Wir können das Gespräch später fortsetzen.
translations.it: Possiamo continuare la conversazione più tardi.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们可以稍后再继续讨论。
translations.pt: Podemos continuar a conversa mais tarde.
translations.he: נוכל להמשיך את השיחה אחר כך.
translations.vi: Chúng ta có thể tiếp tục cuộc trò chuyện sau.
translations.nl: We kunnen het gesprek later voortzetten.
translations.hi: हम बातचीत बाद में जारी रख सकते हैं.
translations.el: Μπορούμε να συνεχίσουμε τη συζήτηση αργότερα.
translations.ja: 話は後で続けましょう。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite/colloquial subject pronoun; triggers 3rd person singular agreement on the verb.
Modal verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; selects the infinitive 'poursuivre' as its complement.
Infinitive verb serving as the complement of 'peut'; transitive, taking 'la discussion' as direct object.
Definite article, feminine singular; determiner of 'discussion'.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of 'poursuivre'.
Temporal adverb modifying the clause; indicates the action occurs later.

sentences.target: Tu poursuis ce rêve depuis longtemps.

translations.fr: Tu poursuis ce rêve depuis longtemps.
translations.en: You’ve been pursuing this dream for a long time.
translations.es: Llevas persiguiendo este sueño desde hace mucho tiempo.
translations.de: Du verfolgst diesen Traum schon seit langem.
translations.it: Insegui questo sogno da molto tempo.
translations.zh-Hans: 你追寻这个梦想已经很久了。
translations.yue: 你追尋呢個夢想已經好耐喇。
translations.ru: Ты уже давно преследуешь эту мечту.
translations.pt: Você persegue esse sonho há muito tempo.
translations.he: אתה רודף אחרי החלום הזה כבר הרבה זמן.
translations.tr: Bu hayalin peşinden uzun zamandır gidiyorsun.
translations.vi: Bạn đã theo đuổi giấc mơ này từ lâu.
translations.ar: أنت تسعى وراء هذا الحلم منذ زمن طويل.
translations.nl: Je jaagt deze droom al lange tijd na.
translations.uk: Ти вже давно переслідуєш цю мрію.
translations.hu: Már régóta üldözöd ezt az álmot.
translations.hi: तुम इस सपने का लंबे समय से पीछा कर रहे हो.
translations.pl: Od dawna podążasz za tym marzeniem.
translations.el: Κυνηγάς αυτό το όνειρο εδώ και πολύ καιρό.
translations.nb: Du har forfulgt denne drømmen lenge.
translations.id: Kamu sudah lama mengejar mimpi ini.
translations.sv: Du har jagat den här drömmen länge.
translations.ro: Urmărești acest vis de mult timp.
translations.cs: Už dlouho jdeš za tímto snem.
translations.da: Du har forfulgt denne drøm længe.
translations.fi: Olet tavoitellut tätä unelmaa jo pitkään.
translations.ja: あなたはこの夢を長い間追い続けている。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 2nd person singular; grammatical subject of the verb.
Main verb, present indicative, 2nd person singular; transitive, with 'ce rêve' as direct object and 'depuis longtemps' as a temporal complement.
Demonstrative determiner, masculine singular; modifies 'rêve'.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of 'poursuis'.
Preposition introducing a temporal complement; here forms the PP 'depuis longtemps' indicating duration.
Adverb functioning as the complement of 'depuis'; expresses extended duration.

sentences.target: Ils poursuivent le bus en courant.

translations.fr: Ils poursuivent le bus en courant.
translations.en: They chase the bus while running.
translations.vi: Họ đang chạy theo chiếc xe buýt.
translations.nl: Ze rennen achter de bus aan.
translations.hi: वे बस के पीछे दौड़ रहे हैं.
translations.ja: 彼らはバスを追いかけて走っている。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 3rd person masculine plural; grammatical subject of the verb.
Main verb, present indicative, 3rd person plural; transitive, taking 'le bus' as direct object.
Definite article, masculine singular; determiner of 'bus'.
Common noun, masculine; direct object of 'poursuivent'.
Preposition introducing a gerundive phrase; forms 'en courant' expressing manner ('by/while running').
Present participle used in a gerundive construction; adverbial complement of manner to the main verb.

Ils poursuivent le bus en courant.
